steps.title: Parse the formula structure
steps.content: The formula $y = (73w)(w)$ is written as a product of two factors. Since the area of a rectangle equals length times width, and we know $y$ is the area, the two factors must be length and width. We're told $w$ is the width, so $(73w)$ must represent the length.

steps.title: Match against the problem statement
steps.content: The problem says the length is 73 times its width. If width = $w$, then length = $73w$. This directly confirms that $73w$ is the length of the rectangle, in feet. That matches choice A — A is correct.
